creator: cs@innolan.dk
text:
Created attachment 172610
Port source

Clean up and further testing. Also tested the compiler produces valid and executable m68k binaries on 10.3 amd64.

portlint: OK
        (Consider defining LICENSE).

testport: OK
        poudriere: i386,  11.0 (tested)
        poudriere: amd64, 11.0 (tested)

        poudriere: i386,  10.3 (tested all options)
        poudriere: amd64, 10.3 (tested all options)
        poudriere: i386,  10.3 (tested)
        poudriere: amd64, 10.3 (tested)

        poudriere: i386,  9.3  (tested all options)
        poudriere: i386,  9.3  (tested)
        poudriere: amd64, 9.3  (tested)
